text:
OPIOID_TKNG_DSCHRG_CD OPIOID_TKNG_DSCHRG_CD High-Risk Drug (Is taking): Opioid (Dsch) CHAR 1 This column documents whether, at the time of discharge, the patient was taking any medications by pharmacological classification, not how it is used, 
from the opioid class. 0 = No 
1 = Yes
- = Not Assessed/No Information
551 OPIOID_INDCTN_ADMSN_CD OPIOID_INDCTN_ADMSN_CD High-Drug Risk (Indication): Opioid (Adm) CHAR 1 This column documents whether, at the time of admission, the patient was taking
